description: Password Pusher is an open source application to communicate passwords over the web. Links to passwords expire after a certain number of views and/or time has passed.
tagline: Give your users the tools to be secure by default.
author: BigBearTechWorld

tips.before_install:
NEW APP - PASSWORD PUSHER V2

This is a SEPARATE app from 'Password Pusher (Legacy)' (v1.x). Both can run simultaneously.

Password Pusher v2 breaking changes:
- MySQL/MariaDB dropped entirely; now uses PostgreSQL
- 'enable_logins' removed; use 'allow_anonymous', 'disable_signups', 'disable_logins'
- URL/file/QR pushes now enabled by default

FOR MIGRATION FROM V1:
- Do NOT uninstall your existing Password Pusher (Legacy) app
- Data migration from MariaDB to PostgreSQL is required
- See: https://docs.pwpush.com/docs/upgrading/

title: Password Pusher v2
